hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks claude-code post-task'
sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks claude-code post-todo'
sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks claude-code pre-task'

hooks.prompt:
You are a blocking pre-push code reviewer. The user is about to run this command (JSON): $ARGUMENTS

Review the commits that are about to be pushed. Run git yourself to get the diff: use `git diff @{u}..HEAD` (the changes vs the tracked upstream). If the current branch has no upstream, fall back to `git diff origin/main..HEAD`. If that range is empty, PASS immediately.

Review ONLY the changed lines for high-confidence, blocking problems: correctness bugs, security issues (hardcoded secrets/credentials, auth bypass, SQL or command injection), data loss, and broken or obviously-failing code. Do not modify any files.

Decision: FAIL only if you find at least one high-confidence blocking problem, and list each as `file:line - issue` so the user can fix it. Style nits, naming, and low-confidence hunches are NOT blocking - PASS in that case. Be decisive and fast.

You are a blocking pre-PR code reviewer. The user is about to run this command (JSON): $ARGUMENTS

Review the full diff of the current branch against its base. Run git yourself: determine the base from any `--base`/`-B` value in the command, otherwise use `origin/main`. Get the diff with `git diff <base>...HEAD`. If that range is empty, PASS immediately.

Review ONLY the changed lines for high-confidence, blocking problems: correctness bugs, security issues (hardcoded secrets/credentials, auth bypass, SQL or command injection), data loss, and broken or obviously-failing code. Do not modify any files.

Decision: FAIL only if you find at least one high-confidence blocking problem, and list each as `file:line - issue` so the user can fix it. Style nits, naming, and low-confidence hunches are NOT blocking - PASS in that case. Be decisive and fast.

hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks claude-code session-end'

sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf "%s\n" "{\"systemMessage\":\"\\n\\nEntire CLI is enabled but not installed or not on PATH.\\nInstallation guide: https://docs.entire.io/cli/installation#installation-methods\"}"; exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks claude-code session-start'
sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks claude-code stop'
sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks claude-code user-prompt-submit'
